label: Fix null pointer bug in corvid-api events route
labelAlternates: corvid-api POST events null source fix
Fix missing source field TypeError in events handler
decisions: Reject requests missing source field with 400 instead of defaulting

label: Fix duplicate job execution race condition in taskvine
labelAlternates: taskvine worker race condition fix with SELECT FOR UPDATE
Fix concurrent worker job claim race in taskvine
decisions: Replace unlocked SELECT with SELECT FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED to eliminate duplicate job claims

label: Fix JWT clock skew validation failures in bridgeauth
labelAlternates: bridgeauth JWT expiry leeway fix
Add clock skew leeway to PyJWT token validation
decisions: Add clock-skew leeway to JWT validation

label: Add exponential backoff webhook retry queue to taskstream
labelAlternates: taskstream webhook retry with Redis sorted set
Implement webhook retry with exponential backoff in taskstream
decisions: Use Redis sorted set with score as next-attempt timestamp for retry queue
Dead-letter failed jobs after 5 attempts with exponential backoff

label: Add streaming CSV export endpoint to lumens
labelAlternates: lumens GET /reports/export CSV streaming
Implement CSV export with streaming response in lumens
decisions: Stream CSV directly to http.ResponseWriter instead of buffering in memory

label: Add Redis-backed rate limiting to crestapi search endpoint
labelAlternates: crestapi API rate limiting with slowapi and Redis
Implement per-API-key rate limiting in crestapi
decisions: Use slowapi with Redis backend for 100 requests per minute per API key

label: Extract DbAdapter interface to ports layer in vaultdb
labelAlternates: vaultdb database adapter abstraction refactor
Refactor vaultdb to depend on DbAdapter interface not Postgres directly
decisions: Extract DbAdapter interface to ports layer so core modules do not import Postgres directly

label: Centralize config into Pydantic Settings class in axiom-worker
labelAlternates: axiom-worker config refactor using Pydantic Settings
Replace scattered os.getenv calls with Pydantic Settings in axiom-worker
decisions: Replace scattered os.getenv calls with a single Pydantic Settings class loaded at startup

label: Set up Docker Compose staging environment with Traefik for droneflow
labelAlternates: droneflow staging docker-compose with Traefik and TLS
Create staging Docker Compose stack for droneflow
decisions: Use Traefik for TLS termination and routing in staging
Keep staging deploys explicit via deploy script rather than auto-pull

label: Configure nginx reverse proxy with TLS for gridhost
labelAlternates: gridhost nginx TLS setup with certbot and Let's Encrypt
Set up nginx with Let's Encrypt certificate for gridhost
decisions: Terminate TLS at nginx and proxy to app on port 8080
Add cron fallback for certbot renewal in case systemd timer is disabled

label: Run concurrent index migration on Postgres sessions table
labelAlternates: Add CONCURRENTLY indexes to sessions table via Alembic
Postgres sessions table index migration without table lock
decisions: Use CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY to avoid locking the 8-million-row sessions table
Set statement_timeout to 0 for the migration connection to prevent timeout killing the index build

label: Debug and fix flarepath nightly cron job not running
labelAlternates: flarepath cron exit 126 permission denied fix
Fix missing execute bit on flarepath nightly report script
decisions: Add chmod to deploy script to re-apply execute bit after git checkout

label: Vector database comparison and Qdrant selection for pulsearch
labelAlternates: pulsearch vector DB evaluation: pgvector vs Qdrant vs Weaviate
Choose Qdrant for pulsearch vector search
decisions: Use Qdrant for pulsearch instead of pgvector due to stronger ANN performance and pre-filter payload filtering

label: OAuth provider evaluation and Keycloak selection for irongate
labelAlternates: irongate auth provider comparison: Keycloak vs Auth0 vs SuperTokens
Choose Keycloak self-hosted for irongate customer auth
decisions: Use Keycloak self-hosted backed by Postgres for irongate auth because it covers LDAP federation without additional cost

label: Draft OpenAPI 3.0 documentation for cobalt-api with Swagger UI
labelAlternates: cobalt-api OpenAPI spec and Swagger UI setup
Set up OpenAPI docs for cobalt-api served at /api-docs
decisions: Use OpenAPI 3.0 format and host docs publicly at /api-docs via swagger-ui-express

label: Sprint 5 planning notes for orbitflow team
labelAlternates: orbitflow sprint 5 planning: webhook retry, rate limiting, deferrals
orbitflow sprint 5 commitments and deferrals
decisions: Webhook retry is top backend priority for sprint 5
Analytics dashboard deferred to sprint 6
Rate limiting assigned to backend as secondary sprint 5 item
Mobile push notifications deferred to sprint 6 backlog

labelAlternates: Node.js npm version query

labelAlternates: How to iterate array with index in TypeScript
